preferred_read_routes.notes: Hermes should orient first through bounded runtime governance, then structured coordination, then shared routing truth.
Keeps markdown doctrine and machine-readable nav state aligned.

risk_zones: root governance docs without explicit approval
escalation_points: Any request for broader Hermes workflow authority
Any canonical promotion or protected-file mutation
Any multi-repo or unrestricted browser/shell expansion

index_alignment.notes: Hermes should preserve Obsidian index structure so future standalone navigation can mirror the same routes.

standalone_mapping.representation_goal: Preserve bounded-runtime navigation semantics across markdown-first and standalone surfaces.
standalone_mapping.notes: These paths should become stable nodes/records in the future standalone representation.
